message:
fix(create): auto-register ParentChild dependency during import when parent is resolved

During `execute_import`, explicitly passed `--dep` arguments were converted
into Dependency records, but the `--parent` flag only resolved the parent ID
without creating a corresponding ParentChild dependency entry on the issue.
This meant imported issues with a parent had no formal dependency edge,
causing them to be invisible to dependency-aware queries (e.g. cascade
delete dry-run, orphan detection).

Add a block that, when `resolved_parent` is present, pushes a
`DependencyType::ParentChild` dependency onto the issue before processing
the remaining `--dep` list. The new dependency uses the same `now` timestamp
and `actor` as the rest of the import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
